name: Southern Dixie Veal, Ham and Cheese Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1 can Condensed cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Pound veal with garlic until 1/8 inch thick.
3. Cut into 12 even pieces.
4. Top each piece of veal with a thin slice of ham and cheese.
5. Roll up the veal pieces with ham and cheese inside. Secure with toothpicks and tie with thread.
6. Dredge each roll with flour.
7. Combine eggs, milk, and horseradish in a bowl.
8. Roll each meat roll in this egg wash.
9. Mix bread crumbs and poultry seasoning together.
10. Roll each meat roll in the bread crumbs.
11. Place seam side down in a baking dish.
12. Bring mushroom soup, white wine, and milk to boil. Pour around the meat rolls.
13. Cover baking dish and bake for 1 hour.
14. Uncover and sprinkle with paprika. Bake another 10 minutes or until crumbs are golden brown.
